title: 2022 Employee of the Year and Matthew Iya
summary: Employee of the Year Employee of the Year is selected out of the outstanding employees who were selected as Employee of the Quarter throughout the year. Nominations are collected each quarter for employees who did an outstanding job throughout the quarter, took initiative to do something beyond his/her job, or completed a task that greatly surpassed everyone’s expectations.
